name: Death Park
short_description: Survive a deadly clown in a haunted amusement park. Solve puzzles, search for items, and make choices that shape your escape. Death Park is a first-person horror game with multiple endings, tense stealth, and terrifying moments.
detailed_description:
🎪 Welcome to Death Park – a terrifying horror escape adventure with puzzles, nightmares, and a killer clown.

You wake up in a creepy abandoned amusement park where something has gone horribly wrong. An evil clown is hunting you… and you’re completely alone. Explore the dark attractions, solve challenging puzzles, and uncover the mystery behind the nightmare.

💀 Use stealth, strategy, and your wits to avoid deadly traps and survive. Death Park combines horror, exploration, and psychological tension with multiple endings depending on your choices.

🔑 Key Features

  • 🎈 Scary horror experience with a unique setting – a haunted amusement park

  • 🧠 Challenging puzzles and escape room elements

  • 🤡 Terrifying evil clown with smart AI that hunts you down

  • 🧭 Multiple endings based on your choices

  • 🔦 Atmospheric visuals, immersive sound, and spine-chilling music

  • 🕹️ Intuitive first-person gameplay optimized for horror fans

Will you escape the clown... or become part of his twisted show?
